zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Danielstoun於1378年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德時，她的父親Robert de Danielston27歲，母親Margaret Montifichet33歲。她於1395年與Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在她的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Danielstoun于1378年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡爾德武德时，她的父亲Robert de Danielston27岁，母亲Margaret Montifichet33岁。她于1395年与Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood在英国苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在她的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Danielstoun was born in 1378, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Danielston, was 27 and her mother, Margaret Montifichet, was 33. She married Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood in 1395, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1440, in her hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Danielstoun est née en 1378, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Danielston, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Montifichet, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood en 1395, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Danielstoun 1378 in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Danielston 27 und ihre Mutter Margaret Montifichet 33. Sie hat 1395 in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Danielstoun è nata il nel 1378 nel Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Danielston, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margaret Montifichet, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood nel 1395, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Danielstoun(이)가 1378년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Danielston(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Montifichet(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Danielstoun родилась в 1378 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Danielston было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Montifichet, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood в 1395 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1440 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.
